title: Buttery Crumbly Portuguese Pul Biber Creme Brulee
description: This indulgent Portuqese dish features a smooth, creamy custard base infused with pul biber and topped with a crisp, buttery crust suitable for pescatarian diets.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons pul biber (hot paprika paste)
ingredients.notes: For adding smokiness and heat to the base

ingredients.name: 2 cups crushed pistachios or walnuts
ingredients.notes: Optional for extra crunch in the crust

instructions: Whip heavy cream and milk together until stiff peaks form. In a mixing bowl, whisk eggs with sugar, salt, and cumin (if using). Slowly fold whipped mixture into egg base.
Add pul biber to the custard mix and stir well. Pour evenly into ramekins or molds.
Bake at 300°F for about 25-30 minutes until set but still slightly jiggly in the center. Chill thoroughly before serving.
For topping, mix together crushed nuts with melted butter and spread over chilled custard. Chill again for a few hours to solidify.
